name: 线性方程
subject: math
domain_name: 表达式与方程 / Expressions & Equations / Expressions & Equations
curriculum_points: 6.EE.7 Solve real-world and mathematical problems by writing and solving equations of the form x + p = q and px = q for cases in which p, q and x are all nonnegative rational numbers.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「线性方程」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：6.EE.7 Solve real-world and mathematical problems by writing and solving equations of the form x + p = q and px = q for …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。
